message:
feat(acfs): auto-install AGENTS.md to workspace root on setup

Updates the flywheel setup to automatically install the AGENTS.md
template file to /data/projects/ during initial provisioning.

This ensures all agents operating on a new machine have immediate
access to the standard operating procedures, rules, and tool
guidance documented in AGENTS.md.

Changes:
- doctor_checks.sh: Added check for AGENTS.md existence
- install_filesystem.sh: Added download and install step for AGENTS.md
  - Downloads from ACFS repo with proper HTTPS enforcement
  - Sets correct ownership for target user

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,7 +105,8 @@ declare -a MANIFEST_CHECKS=(
     "users.ubuntu.1	Ensure ubuntu user + passwordless sudo + ssh keys	id ubuntu	required"
     "users.ubuntu.2	Ensure ubuntu user + passwordless sudo + ssh keys	[[ \"\${MODE:-vibe}\" != \"vibe\" ]] || sudo -n true	required"
     "base.filesystem.1	Create workspace and ACFS directories	test -d /data/projects	required"
-    "base.filesystem.2	Create workspace and ACFS directories	test -d \"\${TARGET_HOME:-/home/ubuntu}/.acfs\"	required"
+    "base.filesystem.2	Create workspace and ACFS directories	test -f /data/projects/AGENTS.md	required"
+    "base.filesystem.3	Create workspace and ACFS directories	test -d \"\${TARGET_HOME:-/home/ubuntu}/.acfs\"	required"
     "shell.zsh	Zsh shell package	zsh --version	required"
     "shell.omz.1	Oh My Zsh + Powerlevel10k + plugins + ACFS config	test -d ~/.oh-my-zsh	required"
     "shell.omz.2	Oh My Zsh + Powerlevel10k + plugins + ACFS config	test -f ~/.acfs/zsh/acfs.zshrc	required"

@@ -122,6 +122,24 @@ INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM
             return 1
         fi
     fi
+    if [[ "${DRY_RUN:-false}" = "true" ]]; then
+        log_info "dry-run: install: # Install AGENTS.md template to workspace root for agent guidance (root)"
+    else
+        if ! run_as_root_shell <<'INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM'
+# Install AGENTS.md template to workspace root for agent guidance
+ACFS_RAW="${ACFS_RAW:-https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/main}"
+CURL_ARGS=(-fsSL)
+if curl --help all 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- '--proto'; then
+  CURL_ARGS=(--proto '=https' --proto-redir '=https' -fsSL)
+fi
+curl "${CURL_ARGS[@]}" -o /data/projects/AGENTS.md "${ACFS_RAW}/acfs/AGENTS.md" || true
+chown "${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}:${TARGET_USER:-ubuntu}" /data/projects/AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null || true
+INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM
+        then
+            log_error "base.filesystem: install command failed: # Install AGENTS.md template to workspace root for agent guidance"
+            return 1
+        fi
+    fi
     if [[ "${DRY_RUN:-false}" = "true" ]]; then
         log_info "dry-run: install: target_home=\"\${TARGET_HOME:-/home/ubuntu}\" (root)"
     else
@@ -157,6 +175,17 @@ INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM
             return 1
         fi
     fi
+    if [[ "${DRY_RUN:-false}" = "true" ]]; then
+        log_info "dry-run: verify: test -f /data/projects/AGENTS.md (root)"
+    else
+        if ! run_as_root_shell <<'INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM'
+test -f /data/projects/AGENTS.md
+INSTALL_BASE_FILESYSTEM
+        then
+            log_error "base.filesystem: verify failed: test -f /data/projects/AGENTS.md"
+            return 1
+        fi
+    fi
     if [[ "${DRY_RUN:-false}" = "true" ]]; then
         log_info "dry-run: verify: test -d \"\${TARGET_HOME:-/home/ubuntu}/.acfs\" (root)"
     else
